chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-319 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 29-10-2025 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. **** Through the instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions against the respondents to start education in Government Primary School, Village Jeeando Morio. On notice, comments have been filed by the respondents, wherein it is stated that the said school is in functional condition where a teacher has now been posted. Learned counsel for the petitioner, however, contends that the teacher who has now been posted, in collusion with some villagers, intends to encroach upon the plot of the school. Under the circumstances, this petition is disposed of with directions to the District Education Officer, Khairpur, to look into the matter personally and ensure that no encroachment is made on the plot or portion of the said school. He is further directed to ensure that other teachers are also posted in the same school as per the strength of the students. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
